samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light system with red, yellow, and green indicators, and a pedestrian crossing request button. The system operates with specific timing sequences and adjusts the duration of the green signal based on pedestrian requests.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian crossing request signal.</input>
        <output id="clock" width_description="[7:0]">Internal counter value.</output>
        <output id="red">Red indicator signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow indicator signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green indicator signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="idle">Initial state.</state>
        <state id="s1_red">State after red signal.</state>
        <state id="s2_yellow">State after yellow signal.</state>
        <state id="s3_green">State after green signal.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="cnt" width_description="[7:0]">Internal counter for timing control.</reg>
        <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">Current state of the traffic light system.</reg>
        <reg id="p_red">Previous red signal value.</reg>
        <reg id="p_yellow">Previous yellow signal value.</reg>
        <reg id="p_green">Previous green signal value.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // State transition logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                state <= 2'd0;
            end else begin
                case(state)
                    2'd0: begin
                        p_red <= 1'b0;
                        p_yellow <= 1'b0;
                        p_green <= 1'b0;
                        state <= 2'd1;
                    end
                    2'd1: begin
                        p_red <= 1'b1;
                        p_yellow <= 1'b0;
                        p_green <= 1'b0;
                        if(cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= 2'd3;
                        end else begin
                            state <= 2'd1;
                        end
                    end
                    2'd2: begin
                        p_red <= 1'b0;
                        p_yellow <= 1'b1;
                        p_green <= 1'b0;
                        if(cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= 2'd1;
                        end else begin
                            state <= 2'd2;
                        end
                    end
                    2'd3: begin
                        p_red <= 1'b0;
                        p_yellow <= 1'b0;
                        p_green <= 1'b1;
                        if(cnt == 3) begin
                            state <= 2'd2;
                        end else begin
                            state <= 2'd3;
                        end
                    end
                endcase
            end
        end
        
        // Counter logic
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n)begin
                cnt <= 8'd10;
            end else begin
                if(pass_request && green) begin
                    cnt <= 8'd10;
                end else if(!green && p_green) begin
                    cnt <= 8'd60;
                end else if(!yellow && p_yellow) begin
                    cnt <= 8'd5;
                end else if(!red && p_red) begin
                    cnt <= 8'd10;
                end else begin
                    cnt <= cnt - 1;
                end
            end
        end
        // Output assignment
        assign red = p_red;
        assign yellow = p_yellow;
        assign green = p_green;
        
    </implementation>
    
endmodule
